title: chrysanthemum longifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum longifolium, also known as the Chinese Long-Leaf Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum longifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent the onset of various diseases and promote overall well-being. Chrysanthemum longifolium is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and its herbal preparations are also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
